landing.heroDescription: Paste your code and get security issues detected with an AI-powered fix in seconds. No setup, no noise — just results.
landing.publicScanHint: Scan any public GitHub repository — no sign-in required
landing.whyVexlitDescription: Stop missing vulnerabilities. Stop wasting time on false positives. Start shipping secure code.
landing.securityRulesDescription: Comprehensive coverage across injection, secrets, crypto, and more.
landing.moreRules: + 70 more SAST rules and 200+ secret detectors
landing.ctaDescription: Connect your GitHub repository and get a comprehensive security scan in seconds. Free to use.
landing.liveDemoTitle: Paste Code. Find Vulnerabilities. Get a Fix.
landing.liveDemoDesc: Try an example or paste your own code — VEXLIT detects security issues and suggests a fix instantly.

features.astAnalysisDesc: Stop wasting time on phantom alerts. AST-based analysis understands your code structure, so findings are real and actionable.
features.sastRulesDesc: 85+ rules covering SQL Injection, XSS, SSRF, secrets, and more. OWASP Top 10 fully covered — out of the box.
features.githubIntegrationDesc: Connect your GitHub repo and get results in seconds. SARIF output appears directly in your Security tab.
features.aiVerificationDesc: Don't just find vulnerabilities — understand them. AI explains each issue clearly and generates a fix you can copy-paste.
features.scanHistoryDesc: See your security posture improve over time with visual trend charts. Know exactly where you stand after every commit.
features.freeOpenSourceDesc: No credit card required. CLI and core engine are MIT licensed. Use locally, in CI/CD, or through the web dashboard.

sections.beforeAfterDesc: See how VEXLIT catches vulnerabilities that manual review misses.
sections.scanOutputDesc: Real terminal output from scanning a Node.js project.
sections.howItWorksDesc: Three simple steps to secure your code.
sections.step1Desc: One click to link your GitHub repository. Public or private — scanning starts immediately.
sections.step2Desc: 85+ security rules analyze your code instantly. See exactly which lines are vulnerable and why.
sections.step3Desc: AI generates a fix for each vulnerability. Copy-paste the suggestion and ship secure code.
sections.jsTsDesc: Full AST analysis with tree-sitter and @typescript-eslint.
sections.pythonDesc: Tree-sitter AST parsing for Python-specific vulnerability patterns.
sections.secretsAllDesc: 200+ patterns detect API keys across any file type.
sections.comparisonDesc: See how we stack up against other security tools.
sections.benchmarkDesc: We run our engine against 11,100+ randomized code samples across 12 vulnerability categories. The benchmark is open-source — run it yourself.
sections.benchmarkWhatMeans: What this means for your workflow
sections.benchmarkMeaning1: 97.4% detection rate means VEXLIT catches nearly all known vulnerability patterns in its covered categories — fewer missed issues in production.
sections.benchmarkMeaning2: Less than 1% false positive rate means almost every finding is real and actionable — no wasted time triaging phantom alerts.
sections.benchmarkFootnote: Internal benchmark using parameterized test cases with randomized variable/function names. Scores reflect detection quality on known patterns — real-world results vary by codebase.

liveDemo.title: Try it now
liveDemo.description: Paste code below to see VEXLIT in action.
liveDemo.placeholder: Paste JavaScript or TypeScript code here...
liveDemo.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
liveDemo.fullScanUnavailable: Full scan unavailable. Showing quick results.

repoScan.invalidUrl: Enter a valid GitHub repository URL
repoScan.publicOnly: Public repositories only. No sign-in required.

publicScan.ctaTitle: Want AI explanations, trend tracking, and more?
publicScan.ctaDesc: Sign in to get AI-powered fix suggestions, scan history, and continuous monitoring.
